data.content: Implementation review complete. Code changes are surgical and aligned with knot ACs (1-8, 10). All 4 quality gates green (lint, tsc, test 3153/3153, build). MODEL_LABELS removed; formatAgentFamily one-line filter+join; OpenCode segment formatter handles all listed vocab cases; settings migration tested for idempotency and machine->display rewrite. AC-9 (visual confirmation) intentionally deferred to user. Approving for shipment.
